reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZdXNMYzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada vez estoy más conforme con haberme asociado al ACA.
En este lugar se repite que los empleados se esmeran en atender súper bien al socio.
Ojalá el ACA sea más prolífico en brindar al viajante más opciones en localidades importantes. Hay zonas de mucha circulación en la que falta presencia.

(Translated by Google)
I am increasingly satisfied with having joined the ACA.
In this place it is repeated that the employees do their best to serve the member extremely well.
Hopefully the ACA will be more prolific in providing travelers with more options in important locations. There are areas with a lot of traffic where there is a lack of presence.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Carlos por tu valoración y comentario. Haremos que tu opinión llegue a quien corresponda. Nos gustaría saber en qué lugares crees que hace falta un ACA

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRaG8yRXdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las chicas que atendían super amables nos dejaron calentar la comida para nuestro bebé (que no compramos ahi) si compramos almuerzo dos Lomitas super rico completo podía ser al pan o plato, elegimos al plato super recomendado incluida gaseosa o agua línea coca.

(Translated by Google)
The girls who served us were super friendly and let us heat up the food for our baby (which we didn't buy there). We bought lunch: two delicious Lomitas, a complete meal that could be served on a bun or a plate. We chose the plate; highly recommended. It included soda or Coca-Cola brand water.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias María José por tu valoración y comentario.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRcE9hQ0xREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, baños muy limpios y amplios. Bien mantenido, pudimos pasar la noche estacionados detrás del edificio.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, very clean and spacious bathrooms. Well maintained, we were able to spend the night parked behind the building.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Alicia por tu valoración y comentario.
